summary: The Long Term & Post-Acute Care (LTPAC) Health IT Collaborative, representing diverse post-acute care stakeholders, appreciates the opportunity to comment on the HTI-5 proposed rule. The comment reflects the perspective of experts in post-acute care settings regarding ONC's deregulatory actions.
notable_quote: The Long Term & Post-Acute Care (LTPAC) Health IT Collaborative... appreciates the opportunity to comment on the Notice of Proposed Rulemaking.
